_comment: Config for tests/knowledge-lint.js. Classifies knowledge files so the schema check knows intent. Citation, tier3, sources, and keyword checks run on all files regardless of classification.
_verticalFiles: Held to the full standard: must export *_INJECTION, *_SCORING_CONTEXT, *_DISCOVERY_INJECTION. Missing INJECTION = hard error; missing SCORING/DISCOVERY = warning.
_partialVerticalFiles: INJECTION required; SCORING/DISCOVERY optional. These are cross-cutting layers that legitimately ship without a SCORING_CONTEXT.
_exemptFiles: Schema check skipped — these have different shapes by design. Text checks still apply.
